personal.name: Prince Yadav
personal.title: Full Stack .NET Developer
personal.subtitle: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer | .NET Core, Node.js, React, Angular
personal.summary: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience delivering enterprise-grade solutions across BFSI, Healthcare, FinTech, SaaS, and Insurance domains. Experienced in designing cloud-native, scalable, secure, and high-performance applications using .NET Core, ASP.NET Web API, Node.js, React, Angular, TypeScript, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Azure, and AWS. Strong background in microservices, distributed systems, event-driven architecture, REST/gRPC APIs, SignalR, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, authentication, caching, asynchronous processing, and AI-assisted development. Passionate about clean architecture, mentoring developers, solving complex engineering problems, optimizing performance, and building software that is maintainable, resilient, and scalable.

responsibilities: Developed and maintained enterprise web applications using .NET Core and Angular.
Designed and developed REST APIs, enabling seamless integration with frontend modules and improving data flow efficiency.
Performed resiliency testing by simulating API failures and validating application stability.
Worked closely with business analysts, architects, QA engineers, and product owners to translate business requirements into technical solutions.
Designed reusable and maintainable software components following SOLID principles and clean architecture practices.
Built secure REST APIs with proper validation, authentication, authorization, and exception handling.
Optimized database queries, indexes, stored procedures, and API response times to improve application performance.
Implemented logging, monitoring, auditing, and centralized error handling to simplify production support.
Participated in Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, backlog grooming, daily stand-ups, reviews, and retrospectives.
Performed peer code reviews and mentored junior developers by promoting coding standards and best practices.
Created technical documentation, deployment guides, API specifications, and architecture diagrams.
Supported production deployments, release management, hotfixes, and root cause analysis for critical incidents.
Collaborated with DevOps teams to automate CI/CD pipelines and improve deployment reliability.
Integrated third-party APIs and enterprise services while maintaining security and scalability.
Worked with Git workflows, pull requests, branching strategies, and version control best practices.

projects.name: AI-Powered Document Analyzer
projects.description: Enterprise-grade PDF parsing and AI-based summarization application designed with a microservices architecture. Integrated RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) patterns, OpenAI API, and semantic searching for automated file summaries. The solution emphasizes scalability, maintainability, security, observability, and enterprise software engineering best practices while supporting future feature expansion.
feature: Built using React, ASP.NET Core, and Python
Implemented PDF parsing and AI-based summarization
Designed microservices architecture with JWT authentication
Configured LangChain and OpenAI vectors for high-efficiency semantic document lookups
Implemented JWT authentication with role-based authorization.
Built responsive and reusable UI components following modern design principles.
Applied repository pattern, dependency injection, and clean architecture.
Integrated Swagger/OpenAPI documentation for all backend services.
Implemented structured logging and centralized exception handling.
Added input validation and security best practices to prevent common vulnerabilities.
Developed reusable utility libraries to reduce duplicate code.
Optimized application performance through caching and asynchronous processing.
Configured CI/CD pipelines for automated build, testing, and deployment.
Designed scalable database schemas with optimized indexing strategies.
Implemented environment-specific configuration and secret management.
Improved maintainability through modular architecture and reusable services.
